bead.title: global install surface: ddx install --global and ddx update --global write the machine-wide plugin tree + agent-tier links
bead.description:
PROBLEM (Principle 2 of epic ddx-602ae31a, slice 2 of 4)

Operators who want one Claude Code / Codex install per machine need a `--global` surface so a plugin is written once to the machine-wide tree and linked into the home-level harness skill directories, available across every project without per-project setup.

ROOT CAUSE
- `runInstall` (cli/cmd/install.go:54) reads the `--global` flag (install.go:49,57) and routes target resolution through `resolveInstallDirs(global)` (install.go:184). When global is true it sets `installRoot = ddxroot.GlobalDir()` and skill dirs to `~/.agents/skills` and `~/.claude/skills` (install.go:185-192); state file selection is via `selectInstallState(global)` (install.go:202-215). Local installs route the same way in `installLocal` (install.go:358, global branch install.go:450-507).
- Update: `performGlobalUpdate` (cli/cmd/update.go:300) operates exclusively on `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/` via `registry.InstallPackage(adjustedPkg, ddxroot.GlobalDir())` (update.go:337) and saves the global state (update.go:346); the `--global` flag is parsed in `extractUpdateOptions` (update.go:395) into `UpdateOptions.Global` (update.go:35) and dispatched from `runUpdate` (update.go:65).

PROPOSED FIX
Ensure `ddx install <name> --global` writes the plugin to `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name>/` and creates symlink-or-copy entries under `~/.claude/skills/<name>` and `~/.agents/skills/<name>`, and does NOT touch the project's `.claude/skills` / `.agents/skills`. Ensure `ddx update --global` updates only the global plugin tree and global state, never the project tree. Expose `--global` consistently on the plugin query surface (`ddx plugin list` / `installed`).

NON-SCOPE
- The no-flag project install in either mode (slice 3).
- `ddx init --global` first-time setup and doctor reporting (slice 4).
- Agent-harness path discovery beyond Claude Code and Codex.

DEPS
- Slice 1 (plugin lookup precedence) â€” global installs are resolved via `ResolvePlugin`'s global layer.
- ddx-06cbaa90 (ddx home resolution) â€” depends on `ddxroot.GlobalDir()`.
bead.acceptance:
1. `TestInstallGlobal_WritesGlobalTreeAndLinksAgentTier` (cli/cmd/install_global_test.go:184) asserts `ddx install <name> --global --silent` writes to `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name>/` and creates symlink-or-copy entries under `~/.claude/skills/<name>` and `~/.agents/skills/<name>`, while leaving the project `.claude/skills` and `.agents/skills` untouched.
2. `TestInstallGlobal_WritesXDGAndAgentTierLinks` (install_global_test.go:48) asserts the same XDG + agent-tier link layout for AC1.
3. `TestUpdateGlobal_UpdatesGlobalNotProject` (cli/cmd/update_test.go:211) asserts `ddx update --global` updates only the global plugin tree and leaves the project install untouched.
4. cd cli && go test ./cmd/... green.
5. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
